label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard bridged to Sanchez on penultimate climb, detonated the break, and soloed to victory while ROGLIC attacked EVENEPOEL on final climb, reducing GC gap from 2:41 to 1:49
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma set pace entire final climb despite Roglic needing to attack, revealing they lacked pure firepower to drop Evenepoel.
Carapaz bridging to Sanchez on penultimate climb specifically detonated break, suggesting early aggression destroys break cohesion before finale.
Evenepoel cracked when Roglic attacked but limited losses to 52 seconds, showing vulnerability appears before catastrophic collapse.
Miguel Angel Lopez bridged to Roglic group for bonus seconds, indicating attacking riders can close gaps on finale despite energy expenditure.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dropped when Roglic attacked on final climb after looking comfortable, suggests he wilts under sustained pace then acceleration
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: gained 52 seconds despite Jumbo-Visma pacing burden, showing recovery from earlier Vuelta struggles
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: followed Roglic attack and finished with Rodriguez group, moving to third overall at 2:43
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: required bike change but minimized losses, suggesting mechanical resilience but revealed no attacking form
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: second stage win via bridging move on penultimate climb, confirming he peaks late in Grand Tours
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: finished in top 10 with GC group, remains factor but showed no attacking initiative
